acts.label: Discover
acts.title: Meet the organisation behind the obligations
acts.description: Start with the business facts that anchor every recommendation.

acts.label: People
acts.title: Map the people who make the business work
acts.description: Capture the workforce and working model without changing the existing assessment meaning.

acts.label: Footprint
acts.title: Trace how work and growth create compliance signals
acts.description: Connect operating footprint, expansion and People support to the current advisory model.

acts.label: Understand
acts.title: Read the organisation story before the handoff
acts.description: Review the facts and run only processing stages that are genuinely completed.

acts.label: Act
acts.title: Receive the current GrowWithHR advisory
acts.description: Use the existing report, PDF and email contracts while the new narrative remains private beta.

business-basics.title: Name the organisation and what it does

business-stage.title: Place the organisation in its current stage

workforce.title: Count the workforce groups that contribute

growth-direction.title: Show what is likely to change next
